business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial property portfolio consisting primarily of warehouse/distribution facilities, manufacturing facilities, flex space, and a corporate administrative office in Ohio.

coverages_discussed.notes: Schedule includes 9 locations in Ohio with building, contents, and business income values. Loss summary shows 2 property claims with 202875 paid and 238554 incurred.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: The insured schedule includes industrial properties in Ohio: warehouse/distribution centers, manufacturing facilities, flex space, and a corporate administrative office. Locations include Rickenbacker Logistics Center A and B in Columbus, Cleveland Distribution Hub in Brooklyn, Dayton Manufacturing Facility, Cincinnati Cross-Dock Terminal, Toledo Industrial Park Buildings 1 and 2, Akron Flex Space in Uniontown, and a Corporate Administrative Office in Columbus.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Most locations are sprinklered. LOC-007 Toledo Industrial Park - Building 2 is listed as not sprinklered.
